name: @yakcc-bench/b9-min-surface
description: B9 — Attack-surface proof benchmark: structural minimality + adversarial-input refusal + in-shape equivalence.
notes: This package.json is NOT in the pnpm workspace (pnpm-workspace.yaml only includes packages/* and examples/*).
@anthropic-ai/sdk is a bench-local dep — it MUST NOT appear in the root package.json.
Install bench deps: pnpm --dir bench/B9-min-surface install
Dry-run mode works without install (no API calls). Real-run requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and pnpm install.
ts-morph: required for Axis 1 reachability. Install via: pnpm --dir bench/B9-min-surface install

scripts.test: node --test test/measure-axis1.test.mjs test/measure-axis2.test.mjs test/measure-axis3.test.mjs test/arm-a-emit.test.mjs test/classify-arm-b.test.mjs test/measure-axis5.test.mjs
